headline: Pool Corporation: Capital Efficiency Supports Strong Thesis, But Headwinds Present
summary: Pool Corporation has demonstrated high returns on capital employed, strong capital efficiency, and organic growth, fueling long-term value. Learn more about POOL stock here.
